series_metadata.series_title: Purchase Orders, Supplier Contracts, and Related Documents
series_metadata.series_description: Documents authorizing the purchase of goods or services and documents or other encumbering materials supporting those authorizations.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Pursuant to R.C. 2305.06, retain for six complete fiscal years after contract expires, then destroy. ; Paper: Pursuant to R.C. 2305.06, retain for six complete fiscal years after contract expires, then destroy., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Wastepaper
